---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or integration
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or workflow gap.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What should happen instead.

**Is this an integration request?**
If you're asking for a payment gateway or server panel integration, link its
API documentation — drivers are usually ~100 lines
(see [docs/extensions.md](../../docs/extensions.md)).
